name: claude-seo
description: Comprehensive SEO analysis skill for Claude Code. 21 core sub-skills covering technical SEO, content quality (E-E-A-T), schema markup, image optimization, sitemap architecture, AI search optimization (GEO), local SEO, maps intelligence, semantic topic clustering, search experience optimization (SXO), SEO drift monitoring, e-commerce SEO, international SEO with cultural profiles, strategic planning, and client-ready multilingual strategy reports across all industries.

args.label: add <client-name>
args.description: Create a new client with folder structure

args.label: list
args.description: List all clients with project counts

args.label: add <client> <project> <url>
args.description: Create a new project under a client

args.label: set <client> <project>
args.description: Set active project (all audits save here)

args.label: list [client]
args.description: List all projects or filter by client

args.label: setup
args.description: Configure WordPress connection (checks .env, prompts for credentials)

args.label: analyze
args.description: Scan images/original/ for NEW images only (incremental analysis) and extract metadata (EXIF, dimensions, filesize)

args.label: list [--filter pending|planned|optimized|synced]
args.description: List all images with status badges (📸 pending, 📝 planned, ⚙️ optimized, ✅ synced)

args.label: plan <target-url> [--ids 1,2,3]
args.description: Analyze page context, propose SEO keywords, check cannibalization. Includes CHECKPOINT #1: user selects images via checkbox

args.label: rename [--ids 1,2,3]
args.description: Rename and optimize images with SEO-friendly filenames (compress to 85%, resize max 1600px width)

args.label: upload [--all | --id <id> | --ids 1,2,3]
args.description: Upload to WordPress. Includes CHECKPOINT #2 (OBBLIGATORIO): user confirms upload via checkbox before proceeding

args.label: status
args.description: Show image SEO status (total, synced, optimized, pending) with recent activity

args.label: <domain>
args.description: Generate client-ready SEO strategy report (auto-detects language, asks for industry)

args.label: <domain> --language <lang>
args.description: Generate report in specific language (en, es, it, fr, de)

args.label: <domain> --industry <type>
args.description: Generate report for specific industry (hospitality, ecommerce, saas, local, professional)
